claim_boundary: The result is an eight-dimensional P1 parent background theorem. It is not an observed-cosmology, Standard Model, physical-coupling, absolute-unit, or full-BHSM result.
dynamic: isotropic sigma stress is compatible with either Einstein fixed-shape trajectory but changes the common-scale solution according to existing primitive coefficients and initial data
massless: for U=0 a rolling homogeneous sigma has p=rho, not the required static p=0
rolling: the existing polynomial potential does not give an exactly time-independent positive dust stress without a new action condition
static: a constant stationary sigma has p=-rho and cannot supply the required positive dust-like p=0 stress unless rho=0
